message:
chore: clean up dead code, add ppoll for Linux, add web client tests

Remove unused exports from web client (AuthResponseType, isMac,
blendWithBlack, ID_GENERATION constants, binary message helpers).
Inline generateId() constants for clarity.

Use ppoll on Linux for nanosecond-precision wake signal timing,
avoiding poll()'s millisecond truncation that loses up to 999us
per wait.

Add vitest and unit tests for constants, protocol, utils, and
dialog modules.

files.patch:
@@ -6,6 +6,7 @@

     "dev": "vite build --watch",
+    "test": "vitest run",
     "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit"
   },
